query:
SELECT 
  o.orderNumber,
  o.customerName,
  o.customerPhone,
  o.totalAmount / 100 as totalRupees,
  o.paymentStatus,
  o.paymentMethod,
  o.razorpayPaymentId,
  o.orderStatus,
  o.orderType,
  o.createdAt
FROM orders o
JOIN users u ON o.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email IN (
  'mohdhendra29@gmail.com',
  'hemadharshini1995@gmail.com',
  'monishgovind48@gmail.com',
  'dramionehead@gmail.com',
  'yadhanaa07@gmail.com',
  'svigneshewb@gmail.com',
  'pandiyan.muthu@gmail.com',
  'divinagarajan@gmail.com'
)
AND o.createdAt >= '2026-03-01'
ORDER BY o.createdAt DESC
